topic: CP history for DOJ PIN question (37484)
summary: CP has been declining from ~75% in mid-2025 to exactly 47% as of Feb 4 2026. The threshold for the meta-question is 47.00%.
content: Key CP trajectory: Started ~70% in June 2025, peaked at 75-76% mid-June through mid-August, then steadily declined. Hit 61% by late September, stayed around 60-62% through December, then dropped to 50% by mid-January 2026, and further to 47% by Jan 29-Feb 4 2026. Latest reading: 0.47 on Feb 4 2026. The meta-question threshold is exactly 47.00%, meaning CP is right at the boundary. Resolution date is Feb 15 2026.
